data.body:
PASS 1 review — [T3] Integration feasibility (overlay): PASS / not-applicable. No findings.

The T3 overlay applies only when a plan integrates a NEW external API/CLI/service/library or asserts a capability it has not used before. Here every external surface the plan relies on is already in production use in this repo and verified present, so under T3's ANTI-FP rule (an internal, already-used integration is not-applicable) this is not a load-bearing new-capability case.

AFFIRMATIONS (T3 sub-checks satisfied):
- T3(a) technical_feasibility — achievable as described, no capability gap. The four enrichment methods the FakeAcliClient mirrors all exist with real signatures: get_issuelinks_map (acli_graph.py:391), get_comment_map, get_parent_map, search_issues; the production merge seam fixtures flow through (fetch_snapshot, fetcher.py:480) exists and already merges the nested `comment` key (fetcher.py:417) and `issuelinks` list (fetcher.py:454) exactly as the 0ee6/3f04 root-cause analysis states.
- T3(b) named endpoints exist — MATCH. The plan's named endpoint `POST /rest/api/3/search/jql` is the live endpoint production already calls (acli_graph.py:426/431/435); code even documents the older `/rest/api/3/search` as retired/HTTP-410 with `/jql` as the replacement. Outbound REST paths the plan touches (`GET /rest/api/3/issue/{key}?fields=issuelinks` at acli_graph.py:582, PUT issue/comment paths) are likewise already present. Verified, in-use — not a new assertion.
- T3(c) auth/HTTPS preconditions — stated and pre-established. JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_API_TOKEN are the existing credential triad; an existing live external suite already round-trips against real Jira under live-gating (tests/external/test_link_sync_roundtrip_live.py, REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL=1), and scripts/capture_jira_fixtures.py is explicitly live-gated (REBAR_CAPTURE_JIRA_FIXTURES=1) reusing those same credentials/endpoints, read-only.
- T3(d) SPIKE routing — not required. No critical capability gap: the strategy is deliberately hermetic (fixtures captured from real Jira, replayed through an in-process fake via the production fetch path), with full live-sandbox e2e and cross-team Pact explicitly scoped OUT as overkill for a single team. No new live external dependency is introduced.

Clean chunk for T3 — empty findings list is correct.
